local.title: Space Mission Control
local.blurb: Keep three astronauts alive while the agent finds the right console — 24 tools, 2 in context.

local.title: Pizza Shop Ops
local.blurb: Run the Friday rush without dropping a pie — Tool Search picks the station, approval gates the oven.

local.title: The Squad Room
local.blurb: A whole AI team (lead, researcher, builder) shares one governed Toolbox — each member, 2 tools in context.

cloud.title: Provisioned Toolbox
cloud.blurb: The same flat-cost trick, but pointed at a real Toolbox you provision on Foundry — one hosted endpoint, real ranking.

cloud.title: Hosted Team
cloud.blurb: The Squad Room on a governed cloud Toolbox — approvals enforced server-side, shared by the whole team.

cloud.title: Bring Your Own Agent
cloud.blurb: Wire Agent Framework, Copilot, or a custom agent to a hosted Toolbox endpoint the same way.
